name: Roshi Pat Enkyo O'Hara
bio: Roshi Pat Enkyo O'Hara is the abbot of the Village Zendo in New York City. She received dharma transmission from Tetsugen Glassman (Bernie Glassman) in the White Plum Asanga lineage. She holds a PhD in media ecology from New York University and is known for integrating Zen practice with social engagement and the arts. She is the author of 'Most Intimate: A Zen Approach to Life's Challenges.'
